ceo.title: CEO Introduction
ceo.description: Driving innovation in state-of-the-art anti-drone solutions and RF technology.
milestones: Led Anti-Drone System construction for KEPCO Shin-Anseong Substation.
Project Manager for GNSS Spoofer deployment at Korea National Oil Corporation.
Executive Director for Defense Industry & Public Sector Anti-Drone Sales.
Expert in RF Circuit Design and Communication System Engineering (ADS SW).

inquiry.title: Technical Inquiry
inquiry.description: Common questions regarding our CUxS integration and defense protocols.

questions.q1: What is the maximum detection range of the system?
questions.a1: Our integrated RADAR and RF scanning suite can detect standard commercial drones at a range of up to 3km with an RCS of 0.01m².
questions.q2: Does GNSS Spoofing cause interference with civil aviation?
questions.a2: No. Our directional spoofing technology is precision-targeted to the threat's coordinates, minimizing signal leakage to authorized aircraft.
questions.q3: Can the system operate in extreme weather conditions?
questions.a3: Yes, the hardware is IP67 rated and tested for operational stability in temperatures ranging from -20°C to +60°C.
questions.q4: How does the system handle 'Dark Drones' (Radio Silent)?
questions.a4: Drones without RF emissions are identified using our EO/IR thermal imaging cameras and AI-driven optical tracking software.

stats.heroMessage: Intuitive control in even the most complex environments.

overview.title: Integrated Anti-Drone Defense System
overview.description: Mirae Tech Vision delivers sophisticated, specialized defense systems to counter the rapidly evolving landscape of advanced drone and UAV threats.

tech.platform: The Mirae Tech Vision Anti-Drone Platform provides a unified Command & Control (SW) system, integrating RF Scanners, RADAR, EO/IR Cameras, GNSS Spoofers, RF Jammers, and Communications Spoofing technology.

stage1.title: Drone Detection
stage1.details: Long-range detection (>3km, RCS 0.01m²) via RADAR & RF Scanners.

stage3.title: Drone Identification
stage3.details: Optical classification via EOIR cameras and RF signal analysis.

stage4.title: Drone Neutralization
stage4.details: Active countermeasures: GNSS Spoofing, RF Jamming, and Communications Spoofing.

heroVideo.title: Counter-Drone, Simplified
heroVideo.content: Easy to train, simple to use, quick to deploy, multi-mission CUxS solutions.

Products.description: Explore our comprehensive range of cutting-edge anti-drone products, designed to provide robust defense against evolving aerial threats.
